description: Governed MCP server — 7 canonical verbs only (init, observe, think, route, judge, act, seal). Human approval gates on irreversible actions, VAULT999 immutable ledger, 888 Judge arbitration, live thermodynamic telemetry. F13 ratified 2026-06-23: expose cognition, hide plumbing.

tools.naming: arif_verb (canonical) — one intent = one public tool

canonical.name: arif_init
canonical.description: START HERE. Bootstrap session + bind actor identity. Select when no session_id exists or resuming a previous session.

canonical.name: arif_observe
canonical.description: Ground in reality. Select when factual evidence gap exists: web search, URL fetch, vitals, repo map. Resolves data uncertainty.

canonical.name: arif_think
canonical.description: Reason under uncertainty. Select when cognitive decomposition is needed: plan, critique, analyze, verify. Resolves reasoning gap.

canonical.name: arif_route
canonical.description: Select organ/tool for intent. Select when intent→tool mapping is uncertain. Bridges to GEOX, WEALTH, WELL, or A-FORGE.

canonical.name: arif_judge
canonical.description: Constitutional verdict. Select when evidence→plan pipeline is complete. Floor check + authority check. Returns SEAL/HOLD/SABAR/VOID.

canonical.name: arif_act
canonical.description: Execute after valid SEAL. Select ONLY when seal_verdict_id + approved_action_hash exist from prior judge→seal pipeline. 888_HOLD structurally otherwise.

canonical.name: arif_seal
canonical.description: Immutable VAULT999 anchor. Select when finality and audit trail required. Cryptographic hash-chain record. Irreversible.

tools.irreversibleGate: arif_act requires seal_verdict_id + approved_action_hash from prior arif_judge + arif_seal
